summary: Focana 2.4.0 makes planned work easier to start, resume, and keep visible without turning task planning into project management.
improvements: Running checklists now prioritize active subtasks by hiding completed rows until Show completed or View all is chosen.
A subtask can now become the visible focus from the running checklist while preserving the original main task and plan structure.
Timed wrap flows now support a cleaner handoff when a next-up task is already queued.
The 2.4.0 planning model keeps structure optional and focused on task initiation, so users can break work down without being forced into a project-management workflow.
